headline.purpose: Major empty states or future section decisions.

body.purpose: Form text, helper copy, recommendation prose, and result details.

label.purpose: Uppercase form labels, tooltip labels, and compact brand marks.

shadows.name: panel-shadow
shadows.purpose: Main optimizer panels and chart container.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Landing reveals and interactive hover transitions.

motion.name: fast-state
motion.purpose: Buttons, links, field focus, and compact state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Optimizer primary action for adding a card, finding the best card, or asking the AI Advisor.
components.css: .ds-button-primary { width: 100%; border: 0; border-radius: 12px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, oklch(57% 0.12 80), oklch(76% 0.13 86)); color: oklch(11% 0.012 72); padding: 10px 16px; font: 600 0.875rem/1.5 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 2px 12px oklch(76% 0.13 86 / 0.25); transition: background 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease, transform 150ms ease; } .ds-button-primary:hover { background: linear-gradient(90deg, oklch(76% 0.13 86), oklch(83% 0.15 89)); box-shadow: 0 4px 20px oklch(76% 0.13 86 / 0.4); } .ds-button-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(76% 0.13 86); outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-button-primary:disabled { cursor: not-allowed; opacity: 0.4; }

components.name: Field
components.description: Shared optimizer text, number, select, and textarea treatment.
components.css: .ds-field-label { display: grid; gap: 6px; color: oklch(76% 0.13 86); font: 700 0.75rem/1.4 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-field { border: 1px solid oklch(27% 0.026 72); border-radius: 12px; background: oklch(20% 0.018 72); color: oklch(93% 0.039 88); padding: 10px 12px; font: 400 0.875rem/1.625 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: border-color 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease; } .ds-field::placeholder { color: oklch(44% 0.032 78); } .ds-field:focus { outline: none; border-color: oklch(76% 0.13 86); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px oklch(76% 0.13 86 / 0.2); }

components.name: Panel
components.description: Main optimizer panel for cards, advisor controls, or chart surfaces.
components.html:
Your Cards

Save each card with its reward percentages by category.

Panel content
components.css: .ds-panel { overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid oklch(27% 0.026 72); border-radius: 16px; background: oklch(16% 0.015 72); color: oklch(93% 0.039 88); box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -5px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 8px 10px -6px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); } .ds-panel header { border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(27% 0.026 72); padding: 16px 24px; } .ds-panel h2 { margin: 0; font: 600 1rem/1.5 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-panel p { margin: 2px 0 0; color: oklch(65% 0.045 82); font: 400 0.75rem/1.5 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-panel-body { padding: 24px; }

narrative.overview: Golden Wallet is a financial utility that should feel like it already knows where the answer lives. The optimizer is quiet, compact, and exact. The landing page may be more expressive, but it still serves a practical promise: ask your wallet which card to use.
keyCharacteristics: Warm near-black surfaces with cream text and bronze borders.
Gold reserved for brand, primary action, focus, selected emphasis, and ranking.
Ranking is communicated through order, numbers, rates, and reward amounts before color.
Motion is short and stateful, with reduced-motion support.

rules.name: The Gold Has a Job Rule
rules.body: Gold means brand, action, focus, selected emphasis, or ranking. If an element is merely decorative, it should not be gold.

rules.name: The Surface Before Shadow Rule
rules.body: Use background steps and borders first. Add shadow only when it clarifies layer, affordance, or first-viewport emphasis.

rules.name: The Panel Scale Rule
rules.body: Headings inside panels should not compete with the card recommendation or reward amount.

dos: Do make the best card obvious through order, rank number, reward amount, and rate.
Do pair chart colors with legends, labels, and values.
Do keep optimizer density practical rather than decorative.
donts: Don't use crypto dashboard cues: neon-on-black, trader-terminal density, token visuals, hype language, or market-screen drama.
Don't use luxury finance clichés: excessive black-and-gold ornament, glossy metal, casino shine.
Don't use gradient text or side-stripe borders as decorative accents.
Don't rely on color alone for rankings, chart meaning, success, or failure.
